Title: Verify login with valid email and password
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Enter registered email
2. Enter correct password
3. Click Login
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage and session is created

Title: Verify login redirects to last visited page after session timeout
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Browse a product page
2. Let session expire
3. Log in again with valid credentials
Expected Result: User is redirected back to the product page after login

Title: Verify 'Remember Me' keeps user logged in after browser restart
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Check 'Remember Me'
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Close and reopen browser
Expected Result: User remains logged in without re-entering credentials

Title: Verify successful login via Google social login
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Sign in with Google'
2. Select a valid Google account
3. Grant permission
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to homepage

Title: Verify successful login via Facebook social login
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Sign in with Facebook'
2. Authenticate with valid Facebook account
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to homepage

Title: Verify login with valid credentials on mobile browser
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Open site on mobile browser
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Tap Login
Expected Result: User is logged in and mobile homepage loads correctly

Title: Verify user can log in immediately after successful registration
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Register a new account
2. Navigate to Login page
3. Enter same credentials
Expected Result: User logs in successfully with newly created credentials

Title: Verify login session persists across multiple tabs
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Log in on one browser tab
2. Open a new tab to the same site
Expected Result: User remains authenticated in the new tab

Title: Verify logout button ends the session correctly
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials
2. Click Logout
Expected Result: User is redirected to login page and session is invalidated

Title: Verify user is redirected to login page when accessing account page unauthenticated
Preconditions: User is registered and on the Login page
Test Steps:
1. Log out
2. Navigate directly to /account URL
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Login page

2. Click Login

2. Click Login
Expected Result: An 'Account not found' error message is displayed

2. Click Login

2. Click Login

2. Press Enter
Expected Result: Relevant products matching the keyword are displayed

Title: Verify search autocomplete suggests matching products
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Start typing a partial product name
Expected Result: Autocomplete dropdown shows matching suggestions

Title: Verify filtering by price range narrows results correctly
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Apply a min-max price filter
Expected Result: Only products within the specified price range are shown

Title: Verify filtering by brand shows only selected brand's products
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Select a brand checkbox in filters
Expected Result: Listing updates to show only that brand's products

Title: Verify filtering by customer rating shows products above threshold
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Select '4 stars & above' filter
Expected Result: Only products with rating 4 or higher are displayed

Title: Verify sorting by price low to high works correctly
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Select 'Price: Low to High' sort option
Expected Result: Products are reordered in ascending price order

Title: Verify sorting by price high to low works correctly
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Select 'Price: High to Low' sort option
Expected Result: Products are reordered in descending price order

Title: Verify sorting by popularity/best-selling works correctly
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Select 'Popularity' sort option
Expected Result: Products reorder based on sales/popularity metric

Title: Verify category navigation shows correct product listing
Preconditions: User is on the homepage or product listing page
Test Steps: 1. Click a category from the main navigation menu

Test Steps:
